headerDisplay: Dreame Vacuum — Matter-native plugin for Homebridge v2. Uses Dreame Cloud + MQTT for real-time state.

username.title: Dreame Account Email
username.description: Your Dreame / Dreamehome app email. Can also be set via DREAME_EMAIL env var.

password.title: Dreame Account Password
password.description: Your Dreame / Dreamehome app password. Can also be set via DREAME_PASSWORD env var.

country.title: Country / Region
country.description: Dreame Cloud region — must match your Dreamehome app region.
